title: Production Database Query Timeouts — ERP and Reports Affected

servicenow_seed.short_description: [TRAINING] SQL Server query timeouts on DB-PROD-02 — ERP and reporting down
servicenow_seed.description: Since 07:45, the ERP application and the BI reporting portal are timing out. DBA monitoring shows DB-PROD-02 CPU at 98% and a runaway query from the nightly ETL job that did not complete. Disk IO queues are also elevated. Executive dashboards are unavailable ahead of a 09:00 board review.

correct_steps: Validate caller and confirm affected servers and applications
Review monitoring dashboards — document CPU%, IO queue, runaway SPID
Set Impact 1 / Urgency 1 — executive dashboards and ERP unavailable
Check for related tickets from ERP team and reporting portal users
Escalate immediately to Database Administration to kill the offending ETL session
Coordinate with ETL/BI team for root cause — identify why the ETL ran long
Notify executive assistants and affected business stakeholders of status
rationale: Production SQL Server CPU saturation from a runaway ETL query is a Tier 3 DBA task. Escalation with a correct Impact 1/Urgency 1 is required. No Tier 2 tooling can safely terminate production sessions.
